## ShutUp Tabs Settings
Paste your ShutUp Tabs settings from VS Code Settings JSON:
```json
{
  "shutupTabs.enabled": true,
  "shutupTabs.closeDelay": 1500,
  "shutupTabs.closeDiffTabs": true,
  "shutupTabs.closeFileTabs": true,
  "shutupTabs.showNotifications": false
}
```
